subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Perth | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-0557
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of poodle work in Perth. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-0557. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
